triggers.name: Feign death FAILED
triggers.comments: The fall broadcast only appears when FD fails - a clean feign logs nothing to others.

triggers.name: FD broken
triggers.comments: Broad self FD-break prefix catches spell, movement, casting, standing and sitting variants instead of only the spell-hit line. ID kept as fd-broken-by-spell even though the pattern now covers all FD-break variants: curated trigger ids are a stable API — users' loadout overrides and channel overrides are keyed by id, and a rename silently orphans them.

triggers.name: Mend success
triggers.pattern: ^You mend your wounds and heal some damage\.
triggers.comments: Legends recast measured from real log gaps (successful mends 133s apart rules out classic 360s; cluster at 133-182s => 120s + reaction). Failure/worsen also burn the recast.

triggers.name: Mend failed
triggers.pattern: ^You have failed to mend your wounds\.
triggers.comments: Legends recast measured from real log gaps (successful mends 133s apart rules out classic 360s; cluster at 133-182s => 120s + reaction). Failure/worsen also burn the recast.

triggers.name: Mend worsened wounds
triggers.comments: Legends recast measured from real log gaps (successful mends 133s apart rules out classic 360s; cluster at 133-182s => 120s + reaction). Failure/worsen also burn the recast.
